title: A ‘Magnificent’ military entrepreneur? The involvement of the Medici Bank in the arms trade (1482-1494)
highlights: Sifting through business accounts and public records, this article demonstrates the involvement of Medici Bank in the military industry of the fifteenth century, shedding new light on the final years of one of the most important companies in Renaissance Italy.
